hero.title_html:
A calmer way
to build beautiful websites.
hero.body: jQuery for interactivity. Tailwind for craft. PagesCMS for content. Three old friends doing one honest job.

features_body: Every piece earns its place. Nothing here to impress a recruiter.

features.title: jQuery
features.body: Still the shortest path from idea to working interaction. No bundler. No ceremony.

features.title: Tailwind
features.body: Design tokens as utilities. Everything consistent, nothing precious.

features.title: PagesCMS
features.body: A friendly editor on top of your Git repo. Content lives with the code.

story.title: Content that lives in your repo.
story.body: Every page is a Markdown file. PagesCMS wraps them in a friendly editor, commits changes back to GitHub, and redeploys automatically. No database to back up. No admin password to lose.
bullets: Git history as your audit log

story.title: Tailwind, without the essay.
story.body: A small set of utilities gets you most of the way. Spacing stays consistent. Colors stay on brand. You never have to name a class called card__inner--alt again.

story.title: No build step. No excuses.
story.body: Two CDN links and a static host. Push to main and you're live. Perfect for portfolios, product pages, and anything that doesn't need a Kubernetes cluster.

journal_body: Drafted in Markdown. Published by a commit.

cta.title: Build the small web, on purpose.
cta.body: Clone the scaffold, connect your repo to PagesCMS, and you'll have a site you're proud of before dinner.

footer: © 2026 Dream Stack · Made with jQuery, Tailwind & PagesCMS.
